actions.expression:
SELECT cggd.wxht,
       cggd.wfgs,
       cggd.ywry,
       cggd.sccj,
       khmc,
       cggd.cgry,
       cggd.jcbh,
       cggd.gdry,
       cggd.yzrq
FROM cggd 
WHERE (cggd.hthm=[入库单.采购合同]) LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT cggdsheet.sid,
       cggdsheet.bzcd,
       cggdsheet.bzkd,
       cggdsheet.bzgd,
       cggdsheet.jz,
       cggdsheet.mz,
       cggdsheet.wxcc,
       cggdsheet.wyzd,
       cggdsheet.wxwyzd,
       cggdsheet.zwmc
FROM cggd,cggdsheet 
WHERE (cggd.sid=cggdsheet.pid) 
  AND (cggd.hthm=[入库单.采购合同]) 
  AND (cggdsheet.cpbh=[入库单.产品资料.产品编号] ) 
ORDER BY cggdsheet.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 计算-外箱体积
actions.caption: 计算-外箱体积
actions.expression: [入库单.产品资料.外箱长度]*[入库单.产品资料.外箱宽度]*[入库单.产品资料.外箱高度]/1000000
actions.output: 入库单.产品资料.外箱体积

actions.name: 计算-总体积
actions.caption: 计算-总体积
actions.expression: [入库单.产品资料.实际箱数]*[入库单.产品资料.外箱体积]
actions.output: 入库单.产品资料.总体积

actions.name: 计算-总毛重
actions.caption: 计算-总毛重
actions.expression: [入库单.产品资料.实际箱数]*[入库单.产品资料.外箱毛重]
actions.output: 入库单.产品资料.总毛重

actions.name: 计算-仓库体积
actions.caption: 计算-仓库体积
actions.expression: ([入库单.产品资料.仓库长度]*[入库单.产品资料.仓库宽度]*[入库单.产品资料.仓库高度])/1000000
actions.output: 入库单.产品资料.仓库体积

actions.name: 计算-仓库总体积
actions.caption: 计算-仓库总体积
actions.expression: [入库单.产品资料.实际箱数]*[入库单.产品资料.仓库体积]
actions.output: 入库单.产品资料.仓库总体积

actions.name: 计算-仓库总毛重
actions.caption: 计算-仓库总毛重
actions.expression: [入库单.产品资料.仓库毛重]*[入库单.产品资料.实际箱数]
actions.output: 入库单.产品资料.仓库总毛重

actions.name: 计算-箱数合计
actions.caption: 计算-箱数合计
actions.expression: [入库单.产品资料.实际箱数]

actions.name: 计算-毛重合计
actions.caption: 计算-毛重合计
actions.expression: [入库单.产品资料.仓库总毛重]

actions.name: 计算-体积合计
actions.caption: 计算-体积合计
actions.expression: [入库单.产品资料.仓库总体积]

actions.expression:
select cggd.hthm,cggd.wxht,cggd.sccj,cggd.cgry,cggd.gdry,cggd.ywry from cggd 
INNER JOIN cggdsheet ON cggd.rid = cggdsheet.pid
WHERE cggdsheet.htzsl > cggdsheet.yjcs
  AND cggdsheet.htzsl IS NOT NULL 
  AND cggdsheet.yjcs IS NOT NULL
actions.caption: 采购合同_选择框

actions.name: 产品编码_选择框

fields.output: 入库单.产品资料.产品编号
fields.caption: 产品编号

actions.expression:
SELECT cggdsheet.cpbh
FROM cggd,cggdsheet
WHERE   (cggd.rid=cggdsheet.PID)
   AND  (cggd.hthm=[入库单.采购合同])
actions.caption: 产品编码_选择框

actions.expression:
SELECT cggdsheet.cpbh,
  cggdsheet.zwmc,
  cggdsheet.bzcd,
  cggdsheet.bzkd,cggdsheet.bzgd,cggdsheet.mz,cggdsheet.jz
FROM cggd,cggdsheet
WHERE   (cggd.rid=cggdsheet.PID)
   AND  (cggd.hthm=[入库单.采购合同])
and cggdsheet.cpbh =  [入库单.产品资料.产品编号]
actions.caption: 产品信息

view.params:
SELECT wfgs.wfgs, wfgs.SID
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

SELECT cggdsheet.cpbh
FROM cggd,cggdsheet
WHERE   (cggd.rid=cggdsheet.PID)
   AND  (cggd.hthm=[入库单.采购合同])
